news.t: Building on Mutual Fund Success: Natixis Loomis Sayles Debuts 2 ETFs
Natixis Investment Managers and Loomis Sayles Collaborate on Launch of Two Active Fixed Income ETFs

overview.description: The Natixis Loomis Sayles Total Return Bond ETF (LSTB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF providing broad exposure to fixed income securities. The fund employs a bottom-up selection approach, allocating assets across bonds of various credit quality or maturity LSTB was launched on Jun 24, 2026 and is issued by Natixis.

data.title: Building on Mutual Fund Success: Natixis Loomis Sayles Debuts 2 ETFs
data.text: On June 24, Natixis Investment Managers and Loomis Sayles & Company rolled out two new actively managed fixed income funds, the Natixis Loomis Sayles Total Return Bond ETF (LSTB) and the Natixis Loomi...

data.title: Natixis Investment Managers and Loomis Sayles Collaborate on Launch of Two Active Fixed Income ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Loomis, Sayles & Company, an affiliate of Natixis Investment Managers with nearly $418 billion in assets under management*, today announced the launch of two actively managed ...
